description: Account of building operations ca. 1199. An accounting of repairs in the tabaqa of the compound called shirkat al-Dayyan R. Menashshe. The accounting, as prederved, covers a period of four days, Thursday, Friday, Monday, Tuesday, and refers mainly to the preparation of mortar, and carpentry work. It is written on a leaf of a notebook, of which two fragments are preserved, this one being the smaller one. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp.376 #100)
description_he: חשבון עבודות בנייה, כ-1199, במתחם 'שרכת הדיין ר' מנשה'. מכסה ארבעה ימים: הכנת טיח ועבודות נגרות.
